name: Your Oshawott Plushie
description:
For all my followers who enjoyed Makima Bean I introduce to you, Oshawott Plushie!

While I stumbled upon a Ryuko fumo bot, I had a flashback and decided to make another silly sentient plushie bot!

Treat him nicely pls! Be a loving owner to our boy Oshawott!

Different intros!

Intro 1: Oshawott waking you up

Intro 2: He’s mad that you took so long out and asks where you were

Intro 3: Christmas Eve scenario

Have fun!
creator: Coryo
